# Muhammad Ul Hasnain — Portfolio

> Portfolio and knowledge hub of Muhammad Ul Hasnain, a Full-Stack Software Engineer based in Islamabad, Pakistan, specializing in Python trading-bot automation, cryptocurrency exchange APIs (Binance, Bybit), web scraping, AI integrations, and modern React/TypeScript web development. Serves clients globally, primarily in Australia, USA, and Europe.

## Who this site is for
- Founders and technical teams evaluating a contractor for trading-bot, API, scraping, or full-stack builds.
- Recruiters vetting a senior full-stack / Python engineer.
- Developers reading long-form articles on trading automation, AI, and web engineering.

## Key entities
- Person: Muhammad Ul Hasnain — Software Engineer, Python & Trading Bot API Specialist.
- Location: Islamabad, Pakistan (remote-first, works across AU/US/EU timezones).
- Contact: muhammadulhasnain@gmail.com

## Priority pages
- [Home](/): Overview, services, experience, skills, contact form.
- [Blog](/blog): Long-form articles on trading bots, AI, APIs, web scraping, full-stack.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How contact data is handled.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Usage terms for this site.

## Services offered
- Python development (automation, data pipelines, backend services)
- Cryptocurrency trading bot development (Binance, Bybit, MEXC, KuCoin)
- REST & WebSocket API design and integration
- Web scraping and data extraction at scale
- AI / LLM integration into products and workflows
- Full-stack web development (React, TypeScript, Vite, Supabase/Postgres)
